name: Analytics page shows stats and charts
description: The Analytics page displays study statistics including sessions per week, cards reviewed, streak count, and visual charts for daily activity.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the My Room section in the sidebar to expand it, then click the Analytics link
Verify the Analytics page displays stat cards showing numeric values for sessions, reviews, cards created, and study minutes, along with a consistency heatmap section
